textByHash.0c8127ce641f07a875c51f6c7dc88229daeeb7a5: Sometimes I like to take a walk out to these shores and look for losers to laugh at.
textByHash.0c8f1a32be64c669b34342ab6c26a306ec26ec8f: Would you like to trade them for a nasty little suprise? I bet you would, wouldn't you?!
textByHash.3b44592a1f0e3a772f37668ac1d2e16c939b305f: You utter fool! You have failed to acquire all the tokens I desire! Now scuttle away from here, loser!
textByHash.4ecdc440761ab053c01a0b735a17d35d9be8c777: Bring them all to me and I'll give you a nasty little surprise!
textByHash.6384460fb634da58d329fd8f8a363547533d7236: Why, yes! I do have a quest for you! I've hidden some goodies around Varlamore! [laugh]!
textByHash.a0f5eb794b7f7e27ae65e6d159b914f369e24970: Yes, yes... This does appear to be all of them!
